entries.name: marketing-retry-failed-deliveries
entries.purpose: Every 5 min: pick up marketing_deliveries with status='failed' + next_retry_at <= now() + attempt_number < max_attempts, enqueue fresh DispatchToProviderJob with attempt_number+1.

entries.name: marketing-reconcile-status
entries.purpose: Nightly 02:00 UTC: roll up per-event delivery aggregates + update marketing_events.status. Findings above 0 are P1 (stuck event = crashed dispatch job).

entries.name: marketing-purge-expired
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 04:00 UTC: apply the per-entity retention windows. Events > 7y hard-deleted (10y for Enterprise); deliveries > 2y hard-deleted; soft-deleted provider_configs > 90d hard-deleted. Dead letters NEVER auto-purged.

entries.name: marketing-half-open-circuit-probes
entries.purpose: Every 10 min: sweep marketing_provider_configs where circuit_breaker_open_until <= now() AND is still marked open. Transition to HALF_OPEN + dispatch a probe event. NOTE: the primary trigger for this job is the delayed enqueue from OpenCircuitBreakerJob; this scheduled sweep is a safety net for cases where the delayed enqueue was lost (crashed worker, queue restart).

entries.name: marketing-detect-high-failure-rate
entries.purpose: Every 15 min: compute per-provider failure rate over the last 15 min window. If > 10% of deliveries failed AND > 10 total attempts occurred: fire MarketingHighFailureRateNotification. Debounce: at most 1 notification per (tenant, provider) per hour.

entries.name: marketing-detect-consent-suppression-spike
entries.purpose: Every hour: compute the consent-suppression rate over the last 60 min window per tenant. If the rate exceeds 3× the trailing 7-day baseline AND absolute count > 100: fire MarketingConsentSuppressionSpikeNotification. Signals a consent-collection bug or a compliance change.

entries.name: marketing-monthly-roas-report
entries.purpose: Monthly 06:00 UTC on the 1st: compute per-tenant ROAS reports for the previous calendar month. Only fires for tenants with the marketing_roas_report entitlement. Delivers MarketingRoasReportReadyNotification.

entries.name: marketing-reset-event-quota
entries.purpose: Monthly 00:00 UTC on the 1st: reset marketing_event_slot_per_month consumed counters for every tenant. This is the entitlement rolling-window reset — Small: 10k / month, Medium: 100k / month, Enterprise: unlimited. Delegated to the entitlements module's monthly-slot-reset infrastructure.
